title: 懐かしめる同志はいずこに……

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
How nostalgic! I still have cards from that game
back at home!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Kawakami! You liked to collect these sparkly
cards when you were a kid too, right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh! You're not talking about that game, are you?! Of course I played it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That day, I learned a harsh lesson. It's not easy to
find a kindred spirit in this world...
